name: IRC_GV_CATEGORIES_VL
query: SELECT CATEGORIES_B.CATEGORY_ID CATEGORY_ID, CATEGORIES_B.CATEGORY_CODE CATEGORY_CODE, CATEGORIES_B.GV_CONTEXT_CODE, CATEGORIES_B.MULTI_ROW_FLAG, CATEGORIES_TL.NAME NAME, CATEGORIES_TL.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION, CATEGORIES_B.PROFILE_CONTENT_TYPE_ID PROFILE_CONTENT_TYPE_ID, CATEGORIES_B.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, CATEGORIES_B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, CATEGORIES_B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, CATEGORIES_B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, CATEGORIES_B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, CATEGORIES_B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CATEGORIES_B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM IRC_GV_CATEGORIES_B CATEGORIES_B, IRC_GV_CATEGORIES_TL CATEGORIES_TL WHERE CATEGORIES_B.CATEGORY_ID = CATEGORIES_TL.CATEGORY_ID AND CATEGORIES_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
